summaryText: Void Touched soaks, beam discipline, and Righteous Flame coverage stayed stable into the kill.

briefInsights.summary: Void Touched soaks, beam discipline, and Righteous Flame coverage stayed stable into the kill.
briefInsights.evidence: The fight stayed stable through its soak and beam checks.
confidenceReasons: Vanguard is built around soak ownership and beam discipline.
The reviewed fixtures expect soak/beam/flame language on this boss.
briefInsights.recommendation: Keep the same soak map, beam movement, and Righteous Flame cooldown plan.

briefInsights.summary: Throughput is below the level needed for a clean progression pull.
briefInsights.evidence: 276K estimated DPS gap across the biggest underperformers.
confidenceReasons: 2 low performers are driving the gap.
276K total estimated DPS is missing from the top offenders.
The throughput pressure is most relevant in Phase 1: Blinded Faith.
briefInsights.recommendation: Review uptime, potion usage, and burst alignment before the next pull.

playerCoaching.summary: Tank stability is still costing the raid recoveries.
playerCoaching.evidence: 1 tank death(s) were recorded on this pull. Bfldk died 1 time(s).
confidenceReasons: 1 tank death(s) were recorded.
Bfldk reliability score: 62.
playerCoaching.recommendation: Clean the taunt swap, pre-call externals, and make the tank plan explicit before pull.

playerCoaching.summary: Utility players are still losing control of key casts.
playerCoaching.evidence: 0 total interrupts recorded on this pull. No matching interrupt line is defined in the plan.
confidenceReasons: No interrupt plan line matches this mechanic or phase.

playerCoaching.summary: Healer stability still needs cleanup before the raid can recover cleanly.
playerCoaching.evidence: Seagie was at 33% active time with 0 death(s).
confidenceReasons: Seagie active time: 33%.
playerCoaching.recommendation: Keep healers alive longer, reduce movement waste, and stabilize ramp timing before the next pull.

playerCoaching.summary: Apocforlife needs cleaner melee uptime without greedy deaths.
confidenceReasons: Apocforlife active time is 95%.
Apocforlife died 1 time(s).
playerCoaching.recommendation: Keep uptime high, but stop trading melee greed for deaths or dropped mechanics.

playerCoaching.summary: Phoenìxs needs cleaner movement and uptime discipline.
confidenceReasons: Phoenìxs active time is 10%.
Phoenìxs died 1 time(s).
playerCoaching.recommendation: Move earlier, keep casting lanes cleaner, and stop losing uptime to late reactions.

confidenceReasons: 146K DPS below the expected target.
Current issue marker: No potion used.
playerCoaching.recommendation: Check uptime, cooldown alignment, and consumables. Current issue: No potion used.
